identity.lead_description: There is no single remake lead. Each included scene is source-locked to a different child card or future still, and the final platform end slate is omitted from the remake package by default.

wardrobe.change_policy: Wardrobe is scene-specific and tied to the still image shown in each included card.
locked_relationships: child cards preserve the clothing from the original group photo
future cards preserve the specific clothing, profession, or courtroom/fashion styling seen in that exact still
the final TikTok Lite end slate is excluded from remake output unless explicitly requested

background.change_policy: Each montage card keeps its own source-locked environment; do not force a shared room or single-world continuity.

composition.framing: mix of group shot, child close-up crops, adult full-body stills, and one mirror selfie
composition.look: editorial slideshow of still images rather than a continuous live-action scene

text.treatment: editable centered comparison headline added in Shotstack
editable centered name label added in Shotstack
editable centered year label added in Shotstack
editable centered name label added in Shotstack
editable centered year label added in Shotstack
editable centered name label added in Shotstack
editable centered year label added in Shotstack
editable centered name label added in Shotstack
editable centered year label added in Shotstack

text.pattern: TikTok Lite watermark and username are source-platform UI only and should be removed or ignored in remake media.

global: at most a subtle editorial zoom or hold

scene_overrides.motion_intent: gentle hold on the group intro card
static hold on the ambiguous future card

overlay_layer_requirements: shotstack.pasteable.json may add neutral text-backdrop overlays over source-derived clips so editable text can cover the baked-in source labels during Studio review.

notes: This package is review-required because it is a multi-subject still montage rather than a standard single-influencer remake.
Canonical packaging uses still-image effects plus editable Shotstack text overlays.
The terminal TikTok Lite end slate is omitted by default from both canonical and pasteable outputs.
